data.name: Hetai Age Urban
data.detailed_description:
Embark on a relaxing and delightful puzzle adventure where every level you complete unveils stunning, mesmerizing images of beautiful girls. Gentle background music enhances the peaceful mood as you skillfully swap and arrange tiles to reveal each full image. As the puzzles gradually grow more challenging, your focus and strategic thinking will be put to the test.

Play freely with no time limits, allowing you to solve each puzzle at your own comfortable pace. Whether you’re a casual player or a dedicated puzzle enthusiast, this experience offers both visual beauty and lasting enjoyment.

Features:

Unlock charming and alluring girl images as you complete puzzles.

Immerse yourself in soothing background music that enhances the calm atmosphere.

Admire the full image once each puzzle is solved.

Progress through endless puzzles with increasing difficulty.

No timers, no pressure — just a relaxing, stress-free puzzle experience.

data.short_description: Relax and enjoy a soothing puzzle journey revealing stunning girl images, gentle music, and increasing challenges that test your focus and love for beautiful visuals.
data.supported_languages:
英文*, 法文*, 義大利文*, 西班牙文 - 西班牙*, 阿拉伯文*, 捷克文*, 荷蘭文*, 印尼語*, 日文*, 波蘭文*, 葡萄牙文 - 巴西*, 葡萄牙文 - 葡萄牙*, 簡體中文*, 西班牙文 - 拉丁美洲*, 繁體中文*
*具備完整音效支援的語言

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7+
  • 處理器: 1+ GHz processor
  • 記憶體: 1 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: 512MB
  • 儲存空間: 1 GB 可用空間
